messages.subject: Vectrix Q4 update — please send board materials before Jan 10
messages.body_text:
Hi Priya,

Happy holidays. Looking forward to your Q4 update. Can you send the board deck and metrics package before January 10? David Kim and Sarah Lindgren will also be reviewing.

For the package, I'd like to see:
- MRR and customer count (monthly, Sep–Dec)
- Cash runway update
- Key wins and misses
- Q1 priorities and targets
- Cap table update if anything has changed

Also — I hear you're close to landing a healthcare enterprise customer. I'd love a brief note on that deal if you're comfortable sharing.

— Amira Patel
Partner, Threshold Ventures
amira.patel@thresholdventures.com

messages.subject: Re: Vectrix Q4 update — board materials
messages.body_text:
Amira,

Happy holidays. Materials coming before Jan 10.

Quick preview since you asked:
- MRR at Dec close: $8,200 (up from $1,200 in September — 6.8x in 4 months)
- 7 paying customers, 0 churn
- Biggest Q4 win: Cascade Systems signed Enterprise at $2,400/mo (closed Jan 8 — technically Q1 but a Q4 pipeline result)
- The healthcare enterprise deal: Meridian Health Systems. $2,800/mo, 12-month contract. VP Engineering found us on HN. Currently in legal review with Orion Legal. Target close: mid-March.

Full deck and metrics to you by January 8.

— Priya Chandran
CEO, Vectrix Labs
priya@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Vectrix Q4 update — materials attached
messages.body_text:
Amira,

Q4 board package attached. Highlights on page 3.

A few things I'll call out that aren't in the deck:

1. We had our first P1 incident on Dec 23 — a rate limiter bug took the dashboard down for ~90 minutes. Jordan was the sole engineer on-call during the holiday. We've formalized an on-call rotation and fixed the alert isolation issue. Full post-mortem is attached.
2. We closed a $400K seed extension in December from David Kim to extend runway to approximately 18 months.
3. Meridian is real — I was on calls with their VP Engineering and VP IT Security this week. Requirements (SSO, US data residency, 12-month retention, SOC 2 Type II) are all addressable. The SOW redlines are the main gating item right now.

— Priya Chandran
CEO, Vectrix Labs
priya@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Vectrix Q4 update — materials attached
messages.body_text:
Priya,

Excellent. 6.8x MRR growth in four months is the kind of number we love to see at this stage.

A few questions after reviewing the deck:
1. Meridian: what's the most likely reason this deal doesn't close? I want to understand the risk clearly.
2. Dashboard v2: is the March launch date firm? Any customer commitments that depend on it?
3. Runway: the 18-month figure assumes no new hires. What's the hiring plan?

Let's do a call January 15 at 2pm PT. I'll have David Kim and Sarah Lindgren join.

— Amira Patel
Partner, Threshold Ventures
amira.patel@thresholdventures.com
